content: Coolify Cloud API (https://app.coolify.io/api/v1) and self-hosted Coolify API (v4) are highly compatible and share the exact same endpoints. Both support Bearer token authentication via tokens generated in /security/api-tokens. Coolify Cloud operates on a team-scoped subscription model, where additional teams require subscriptions, and does not support system-wide configurations, which are reserved for self-hosted instances. The existing URL-agnostic client is perfectly compatible.
